originalTitle: Valve says it’s ready to launch the Steam Machine this summer
summary: Valve now says that the delayed Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset are set to launch sometime this summer. In a Thursday blog post detailing its Verified programs for both pieces of hardware, Valve concludes by saying that "We're excited for players to try your titles on the new Steam hardware once they […]
content: Valve now says that the delayed Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset are set to launch sometime this summer. In a Thursday blog post detailing its Verified programs for both pieces of hardware, Valve concludes by saying that “We’re excited for players to try your titles on the new Steam hardware once they launch this summer.” When the company originally announced the Machine and Frame alongside its new Steam Controller late last year, it said that it would start shipping the new gadgets in early 2026. But in February, the company announced that the ongoing memory and storage crunch had forced it to revisit its pricing and shipping plans. And in March, Valve said in a blog post that it would be “shipping all three products this year” — though that was after the company initially said in the post that “we hope to ship in 2026,” which it removed in an update. Valve opted to release the Steam Controller on its own, putting it up for sale in early May. For the Machine and Frame, while “summer” isn’t exactly a specific date, it narrows the window for when the products might finally come out. [Image: Me, wearing a Steam Frame. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/11/258049_Valve_2025_EverythingTimeStudio_0056.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] Ahead of actually launching the devices, Valve is redesigning the Steam store and sharing information about the Verified programs for the hardware so that developers can prepare their games. Like with the Steam Deck, if a game is verified for the Machine or the Frame, the badge signals that the game should work well without any tweaks from the user. For the Machine, the requirements for a game to be verified are “nearly identical” to what they are for the Steam Deck. With the Machine being “roughly six times as powerful” as the Deck, in theory, many more games will be verified for it. Valve also says that it’s testing “every title on Machine that fell below our performance requirements on Deck.” For the Frame, Valve’s verified badge will signify games that run well while being played natively on the headset — as opposed to games that work well streamed to the headset, which the Frame is also capable of. “Like Steam Deck Verified, the Steam Frame Standalone Verified program focuses on the experience customers will have with the device out-of-the-box in standalone mode,” Valve says. Now, we just need Valve to share exactly when the Steam Machine and Steam Frame will be released and how much they might cost. After last week’s price hikes for the Steam Deck, I’m gearing up for sticker shock.
chineseTitle: Valve 表示已准备好在今年夏天推出 Steam Machine
chineseSummary: Valve 现在表示，延迟推出的 Steam Machine PC 和 Steam Frame VR 耳机将于今年夏天的某个时候推出。在周四的一篇博文中，详细介绍了针对这两种硬件的验证程序，Valve 最后表示：“我们很高兴玩家能够在新的 Steam 硬件上尝试您的游戏，一旦他们 [...]
chineseContent: Valve 现在表示，延迟推出的 Steam Machine PC 和 Steam Frame VR 耳机将于今年夏天的某个时候推出。 Valve 在周四的博客文章中详细介绍了这两款硬件的验证计划，最后表示：“我们很高兴玩家能够在今年夏天推出的新 Steam 硬件上尝试您的游戏。”当该公司最初在去年年底宣布 Machine 和 Frame 以及新的 Steam 控制器时，曾表示将于 2026 年初开始发货这些新设备。但在 2 月份，该公司宣布，持续的内存和存储紧缺迫使其重新审视其定价和发货计划。今年 3 月，Valve 在一篇博客文章中表示，它将“在今年发货所有三款产品”——尽管该公司最初在博文中表示“我们希望在 2026 年发货”，但在更新中删除了这一说法。 Valve 选择自行发布 Steam 控制器，并于 5 月初上市销售。对于 Machine and Frame 来说，虽然“夏季”并不是一个具体的日期，但它缩小了产品最终上市的时间窗口。 [图片：我，戴着蒸汽框架。 https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/11/258049_Valve_2025_EverythingTimeStudio_0056.jpg?quality=90&strip=all] 在实际推出这些设备之前，Valve 正在重新设计 Steam 商店并分享有关硬件验证程序的信息，以便开发者可以准备他们的游戏。与 Steam Deck 一样，如果游戏通过了机器或框架的验证，徽章会表明游戏应该可以正常运行，而无需用户进行任何调整。对于机器来说，要验证的游戏的要求与 Steam Deck 的要求“几乎相同”。该机器“大约是功率的六倍
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
